metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Network Session ASIM filtering parser for Check Point Smart Defense
properties.query:
let parser = (starttime:datetime=datetime(null), 
  endtime:datetime=datetime(null),
  srcipaddr_has_any_prefix:dynamic=dynamic([]),
  dstipaddr_has_any_prefix:dynamic=dynamic([]),
  ipaddr_has_any_prefix:dynamic=dynamic([]),
  dstportnumber:int=int(null),
  hostname_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]), 
  dvcaction:dynamic=dynamic([]),
  eventresult:string='*', disabled: bool, pack: bool) {
  let DvcActionLookup = datatable (DvcOriginalAction: string, DvcAction: string) [
      "Reject", "Deny",
      "Drop", "Drop",
      "Accept", "Allow",
      "Prevent", "Deny",
      "Detect", "Deny"
  ];
  let EventSeverityLookup = datatable (EventOriginalSeverity: string, EventSeverity: string) [
      "Low", "Low",
      "Medium", "Medium",
      "Very-High", "High",
      "High", "High",
      "Unknown", ""
  ];
  let ThreatConfidenceLookup = datatable (ThreatOriginalConfidence: int, ThreatConfidenceNew: int) [
      0, 0,
      1, 20,
      2, 40,
      3, 60,
      4, 80,
      5, 100
  ];
  let src_or_any = set_union(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix, ipaddr_has_any_prefix); 
  let dst_or_any = set_union(dstipaddr_has_any_prefix, ipaddr_has_any_prefix);
  CommonSecurityLog
  | where not(disabled)
  | where DeviceVendor == "Check Point" and DeviceProduct == "SmartDefense"
  | where (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime) 
          and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
          and ((array_length(hostname_has_any) == 0) or SourceHostName has_any (hostname_has_any))
          and (isnull(dstportnumber) or (DestinationPort == dstportnumber))
  | extend
      temp_isSrcMatch = has_any_ipv4_prefix(SourceIP, src_or_any), 
      temp_isDstMatch = has_any_ipv4_prefix(DestinationIP, dst_or_any)
  | extend ASimMatchingIpAddr = case(
      array_length(src_or_any) == 0 and array_length(dst_or_any) == 0, "-", 
      (temp_isSrcMatch and temp_isDstMatch), "Both", // has to be checked before the individual 
      temp_isSrcMatch, "SrcIpAddr",
      temp_isDstMatch, "DstIpAddr",
      "No match"
  )
  | where ASimMatchingIpAddr != "No match"
  | extend
      EventSchema = "NetworkSession",
      EventSchemaVersion = "0.2.7",
      EventCount = coalesce(EventCount, int(1)),
      Type = "CommonSecurityLog",
      EventStartTime = TimeGenerated,
      EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
      EventVendor = "CheckPoint",
      EventType = "NetworkSession"
  | project-rename
      EventProduct = DeviceProduct,
      SrcIpAddr = SourceIP,
      SrcPortNumber = SourcePort,
      SrcUsername = SourceUserName,
      SrcHostname = SourceHostName,
      DstIpAddr = DestinationIP,
      DstPortNumber = DestinationPort,
      EventOriginalSeverity = LogSeverity,
      EventMessage = Message,
      SrcBytes = SentBytes,
      DstBytes = ReceivedBytes,
      DvcOriginalAction = DeviceAction,
      EventOriginalSubType = Activity,
      SrcAppName = SourceServiceName
  | lookup EventSeverityLookup on EventOriginalSeverity
  | lookup DvcActionLookup on DvcOriginalAction
  | where ((array_length(dvcaction) == 0) or DvcAction has_any (dvcaction))
  | parse-kv AdditionalExtensions as (version: string, rule: string, rule_name: string, loguid: string, originsicname: string, origin: string) with (kv_delimiter="=", pair_delimiter=";")
  | parse originsicname with "CN\\=" DvcHostname "," *
  | project-rename
      Dvc = origin,
      EventOriginalUid = loguid
  | extend
      EventResult = iff(DvcAction == "Allow" or DvcAction == "", "Success", "Failure")
  | where ((eventresult == "*") or (EventResult == eventresult))
  | extend
      SrcUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(SrcUsername), "Simple", ""),
      NetworkRuleName = rule_name,
      NetworkRuleNumber = toint(rule),
      EventProductVersion = version,
      NetworkDirection = case(
          CommunicationDirection == "1", "Inbound",
          CommunicationDirection == "0", "Outbound",
          "NA"
      ),
      AdditionalFields = bag_pack(
          "Performance Impact", iff(FlexNumber2Label == "Performance Impact", FlexNumber2, toint("")),
          "Threat Prevention Rule Name", iff(DeviceCustomString1Label == "Threat Prevention Rule Name", DeviceCustomString1, ""),
          "Protection ID", iff(DeviceCustomString2Label == "Protection ID", DeviceCustomString2, ""),
          "Protection Type", iff(DeviceCustomString3Label == "Protection Type", DeviceCustomString3, ""),
          "Threat Prevention Rule ID", iff(DeviceCustomString4Label == "Threat Prevention Rule ID", DeviceCustomString4, ""),
          "Protection Name", iff(DeviceCustomString4Label == "Protection Name", DeviceCustomString4, "")
      )
  | extend
      ThreatOriginalConfidence = iff(FlexNumber1Label == "Confidence", FlexNumber1, toint("")),
      ThreatName = iff(FlexString2Label == "Attack Information", FlexString2, "")
  | lookup ThreatConfidenceLookup on ThreatOriginalConfidence
  | extend
      ThreatOriginalConfidence = tostring(ThreatOriginalConfidence),
      ThreatConfidence = ThreatConfidenceNew,
      IpAddr = SrcIpAddr
  | project
      TimeGenerated,
      Type,
      EventSchema,
      EventSchemaVersion,
      EventCount,
      EventStartTime,
      EventEndTime,
      EventVendor,
      EventProduct,
      EventType,
      SrcIpAddr,
      SrcPortNumber,
      SrcUsername,
      SrcHostname,
      DstIpAddr,
      DstPortNumber,
      EventOriginalSeverity,
      EventMessage,
      SrcBytes,
      DstBytes,
      DvcOriginalAction,
      EventOriginalSubType,
      SrcAppName,
      EventSeverity,
      DvcAction,
      DvcHostname,
      Dvc,
      EventOriginalUid,
      SrcUsernameType,
      NetworkRuleName,
      NetworkRuleNumber,
      EventProductVersion,
      EventResult,
      NetworkDirection,
      AdditionalFields,
      ThreatOriginalConfidence,
      ThreatName,
      ThreatConfidence,
      IpAddr,
      ASimMatchingIpAddr
};
parser(starttime=starttime, endtime=endtime, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix=srcipaddr_has_any_prefix, dstipaddr_has_any_prefix=dstipaddr_has_any_prefix, ipaddr_has_any_prefix=ipaddr_has_any_prefix, dstportnumber=dstportnumber, hostname_has_any=hostname_has_any, dvcaction=dvcaction, eventresult=eventresult, disabled=disabled, pack=pack)
